THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHARTON, JACK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL #602, STAYED UNTIL MAR-05-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
